dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} struck our settlement and dragged off several people. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} being held at the {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} quickly, {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_ally} spotted the area {location_hint}. Gather {quest_item} along the way: we may need them to break through the defenses.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every moment we wait, those people suffer. Please, you are our only hope.

playerResponses.text: I will bring them home. Every last one.
How many captors are we talking about?
That sounds like a fortress. I cannot do this alone.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} been trapped inside the {quest_focus}. We can hear them calling out, but the path is blocked.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} by clearing the way. The {enemy_type} have been drawn to the site and are lurking {location_hint}. We also need {quest_item} to secure the area.
dialogueChunks.outro: Time is running out down there. Every hour counts, {player_name}.

playerResponses.text: People are trapped. I will not stand by.
Creatures and rubble? What is my cut?
I am not risking my life in there.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_focus} {quest_focus_has} been surrounded by the {quest_threat} for days. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} running low on supplies and cannot hold much longer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone needs to {quest_action} from the outside. The {enemy_type} are dug in {location_hint}. If you bring {quest_item}, the defenders can use them to push back.
dialogueChunks.outro: Save them, and you will have access to {quest_reward_hint} and the gratitude of every soul inside those walls.

playerResponses.text: They need help? I am on my way.
Tell me more about what I stand to gain.
One person against all of that? No.
